behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the exact expected output 'Ancestors: 2|section|home|' via the description 'exactly 2 ancestors (section|home)' and specifies the config and file path.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the symptom and where to fix (alldecoders.go) but does not dictate exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only verify rendered output and package-level tests; any correct filter of empty taxonomy keys/values would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests build Hugo, run subprocess, and check rendered HTML output plus run go test suites.

test_not_tautological.reason: Test requires actual Hugo rendering to produce 'Ancestors: 2|section|home|'; a stub cannot satisfy this.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the ancestor count behavior, build success, and relevant package tests as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have clear docstrings labeling fail-to-pass and pass-to-pass groups.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file (alldecoders.go) but not the specific line; localization within file still required.
